structural_findings: Scanner rows have features but no run_id/returns (worker writes before orchestrator assigns run_id).
Outcome-sync rows have run_id/returns but drop tech_score/whale_score/volume_ratio (never written by outcome path).
Result: training-complete rows (features + returns in one row) = 0.
Bug: build_kr_scan_outputs omitted entry_reference_price. Fixed in working tree; handoff to Codex via swing-main-0to.
Historical rescue infeasible: 113 scanner_full rows exist vs 60K+ outcomes — match window empty for old dates.
Forward fix: db_manager fallback merge (e7c23d4) UPDATEs scanner_full rows when outcome sync arrives, preserving all fields. Training-complete count should grow as new scans accumulate.
forward_plan: Monitor training_complete_rows growth after e7c23d4 lands in production. Retrain model once >= 1000 complete rows accumulate (probably ~10-20 scan days at current rate).
